article.title: Private AI for Small Business: Start Safe Without Overbuilding

blog.title: Private AI for Small Business: Start Safe Without Overbuilding

facebook.caption:
Private AI for Small Business: Start Safe Without Overbuilding

Private AI should start with one safe workflow, clear data boundaries, and a lead path that can be measured. This EB28 refresh breaks down how small businesses can start without overbuilding.

Read it: https://eb28.co/blog/private-ai-for-small-business-the-safe-way-to-start-without-overbuilding/

instagram.caption:
Private AI works best when it starts small.

Pick one workflow. Keep sensitive data in a controlled path. Review output before it reaches customers. Connect the next step to a real lead path.

Read the full guide at eb28.co/blog/

shortFormVideo.hook: Private AI should not start as a giant platform build.
shortFormVideo.brief: 15-25 second vertical video. Open with a messy stack of internal documents, cut to three text beats: choose one workflow, protect sensitive data, review output before customers see it. End on the EB28 article title and Melbourne Web Studio project brief CTA.
shortFormVideo.caption: Start private AI with one safe workflow, controlled data, and a lead path you can measure.
